ocr_findings.description: Answer line at bottom: image shows '問題4-11 エ' but OCR has '問題4-11 工' — katakana/kanji confusion between エ (katakana) and 工 (kanji). Changes meaning of answer key.

reviewer_notes: Four exam questions (4-11 to 4-14) on neural networks, deep learning, AI, and GPS/IoT topics. All question stems and answer choices captured accurately. Only issue is a single character substitution in the answer key line at page bottom (エ rendered as 工).
